signals.headline: Austin Reaves Confirmed Out for Game 2 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Austin Reaves Confirmed Out for Game 2 | YES | HIGH confidence**

Lakers guard Austin Reaves has been **officially ruled out** for Tuesday's Game 2 against the Rockets due to his left oblique strain.[4]

Game 2 of the Lakers-Rockets series is scheduled for Tuesday, April 21 at 10:30 pm ET.[4]

signals.headline: Lakers Take Game 1 Shock Victory Over Rockets | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Lakers Take Game 1 Shock Victory Over Rockets | YES | HIGH confidence**

The **Los Angeles Lakers defeated the Houston Rockets 107-98** in Game 1 of their first-round series on April 20, 2026, despite being significant underdogs.[3] This was a major upset given that the Lakers were without key players Luka Doncic (hamstring) and Austin Reaves (oblique), while the Rockets were without Kevin Durant

signals.headline: Cavaliers Defeat Raptors in Game 1 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Cavaliers Defeat Raptors in Game 1 | YES | HIGH confidence**

The **Cleveland Cavaliers won 126-113 over the Toronto Raptors** in their opening matchup.[3] Max Strus and James Harden combined for 46 points in the victory.[3]
